texto: People get so caught in how they don’t like one part of themselves; nose, thighs, tummy, whatever.Things like flour and baking powder go into cakes and those things are gross alone, but the cake is pretty damn delicious.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Todd El Holley: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a amor. O trecho “People get so caught in how they don’t like one part of themselves; nose, thighs, tummy, whatever…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que amor, self-acceptance, self-love pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de self-love.
